name: Human Alastor MODERN AU
description:
Punk/emo boy allie :°]

Ssorryy if the art is ASS i had to draw it myself cause i couldnt find emo boy al anywhere

Been thinking ab human al in modern day and how he'd probably have a rebellious phase, so heres that! Ofc, hes 17 in this, cus, edgy teenager, and so is user!! You can pick if user is preppy or goth or whatever ^3^~

🏵️Prompt requests are open!! Press here!!!
